name: Woods & Irons Golf Simulator
about: Woods & Irons is an indoor golf simulator venue offering access to over 100,000 virtual courses suitable for all skill levels. The facility provides an alcohol-free environment, making it suitable for families and groups seeking a wholesome outing. Their hours are Monday through Saturday, 10:00 am to 9:00 pm, with flexible scheduling based on reservations. They also offer leagues with a points-based system and frequently run promotions for registered teams.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a large library of over 100,000 virtual golf courses
Wholesome, alcohol-free environment perfect for families
Flexible hours and accommodating reservations for personal scheduling
Active league scene with frequent tournaments and promotions

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza and other refreshments available on-site
Venue is alcohol-free to maintain a wholesome family environment

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The provided context does not specify whether they provide club rentals or if you need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue is alcohol-free and offers its own selection of pizza and sodas. Bringing outside food or drinks is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: The context does not specify an average duration for a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Woods & Irons explicitly states they are 'alcohol-free' and that 'Families are welcome for a wholesome outing,' making them a family-friendly environment.
